patterns.pattern: ^(You) unleash a raging cataclysm of destruction, the area directly surrounding (.+) becoming nothing but fire and ash\.$
^(You) prepare to unleash a cataclysm against (.+), but \w+ anticipates your intent and moves out of your target area\.$
^The flames that compose (\w+) burn brighter for a moment, but seeming to sense some danger (.+) quickly moves away from \w+ current position\.$
^As the flames that compose (\w+) burn ever brighter, the area surrounding (.+) is consumed in a raging cataclysm of destruction, the inferno burning white hot as it engulfs \w+\.$
^(You) call forth a raging firestorm to destroy (.+), its insatiable fury falling upon \w+ with ravenous intent\.$
^A raging firestorm comes into being at the will of (\w+), its insatiable fury decesnding upon (.+), completely engulfing \w+\.$
^Summoning forth the primal fires, (you) engulf (.+) in flames\!$
^(\w+) burns white hot for an instant as flames explode into being around (.+), engulfing \w+ utterly\.$
^(You) scourge (.+) with a whip of flame, leaving \w+ sensitive and raw\.$
^(\w+) scourges the form of (.+) with a hissing whip of flame, leaving \w+ sensitive and raw\.$
^(You) manifest a net of flame and cast it about the form of (.+)\.$
^A net of flame coalesces in the grasp of (\w+), and \w+ casts it about the form of (.+)\.$
^Raising a hand, (you) send forth thin wires of flame, their searing filaments tearing through the magical shield surrounding (.+)\.$
^Fine? filaments of flame leap from the upraised hand of (\w+), tearing through the translucent shield that protects (.+)\.$
^A whip of liquid flame coalesces in (you)r hand, and with a savage lash you send it to scourge the flesh of (.+)\.$
^A whip of flame coalesces in the hand of (\w+), which \w+ brings around in a savage lashing motion to scourge the flesh of (.+)\.$
^The magical shield surrounding (.+) suddenly shatters for no visible reason, flames spontaneously igniting upon \w+ skin\.$
^You superheat the air surrounding (.+), \w+ magical shield shattering under the onslaught and \w+ skin catching aflame\.$
